name: Dinomorphia Sonic
name_jp: ダイノルフィア・ソニック
desc: When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card, while you control a "Dinomorphia" monster: Pay half your LP; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card, then, destroy 1 "Dinomorphia" monster you control. During damage calculation, while your LP are 2000 or less, if you would take battle damage: You can banish this card from your GY; you take no battle damage from that battle. You can only activate 1 "Dinomorphia Sonic" per turn.
eff: When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card, while you control a "Dinomorphia" monster: Pay half your LP; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card, then, destroy 1 "Dinomorphia" monster you control. During damage calculation, while your LP are 2000 or less, if you would take battle damage: You can banish this card from your GY; you take no battle damage from that battle. You can only activate 1 "Dinomorphia Sonic" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
